productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Leather Formal Shoe
description: Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a slip-on design from red tape. These shoes are designed for comfort and will look great when teamed with chinos or jeans and shirts for a casual look.Upper High quality leather uppers with rugged look for protection, comfort and durability Comfortable slip-on design with elasticated inserts for easy insertion and removal of the feet Cushioned collar for greater comfort Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directioanl pattern for better grip and durability shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
